creator: Herbert Hillary Booker 2nd - Tujunga, California - 2009
description: Among the non-U.S. issue postage stamps, these are among the rarest today. The (South) Australia 1855 is the rarest and costliest. These are all gems and were as close to mint as possible. Feel free to show your rare stamps here too!
